title: Test ordered members upload
creator: Racey, Kenneth
subject: http://id.worldcat.org/fast/1006948|http://id.worldcat.org/fast/832970|http://id.worldcat.org/fast/833033|http://id.worldcat.org/fast/833023
description: This field journal is field notes organized both as lists chronologically and alphabetical indexes. It recorded birds migration dates and observations around Alta Lake near Whistler, BC.
license: Contact UVic Special Collections and University Archives for access to the original resource and for reproduction requests. This material is made available on this site for research and private study only.
alternative_title: Alta Lake, BC 1920-1927 Notes by Kenneth Racey
additional_physical_characteristics: Kraft paper hand bound, pencil and ink on various types of papers of various sizes.
sponsor: Digitization undertaken with the support of Ann Schau.
technical_note: Scanning contracted to Meyer zu Erpen & Associates, Inc., Victoria, BC for the BPenn The Real Thing book project. Metadata by BPenn, KMercer, M. He. Migration metadata by KD.
